campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 5, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to review transportation funding investments from March 2026, approve a new policy about how city property can be used, and discuss efforts to fill open city jobs and keep current employees.
keyTopics: Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority investment report for March 2026
New city council policy on federal civil enforcement use of city property
City job openings and strategies to hire and retain employees

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — April 15, 2026
saratoga.summary: The city council held a public hearing to address concerns about cleaning up hazardous conditions on properties identified by the county, and voted to move forward with the cleanup work. The council also adopted a new technology policy and approved a process for residents to request accommodations.
keyTopics: Public hearing on hazardous property abatement ordered by county
Adoption of new Technology Disruption Policy
New process for requesting reasonable accommodations from the city

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — May 19, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on May 19, 2026, to approve meeting minutes, review the town's finances for March, and authorize several agreements and contracts. The council approved accepting a donation of an automated external defibrillator, hired O'Grady Paving for construction work, and set priorities for upcoming town projects in the 2026-2027 fiscal year.
keyTopics: Approved O'Grady Paving construction contract
Accepted donation of automated external defibrillator (AED)
Reviewed March 2026 financial and investment report
Authorized five-year service agreement
Adopted fiscal year 2026-2027 project priorities and grant applications

san-jose.title: San José City Council — May 20, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to plan upcoming agenda items and review committee work plans. The May 26 meeting was cancelled, and the council focused on organizing the June 2 agenda, including adding new items and scheduling time-sensitive discussions.
keyTopics: May 26 meeting cancelled
June 2 draft agenda organization
Neighborhood Services and Education Committee work plan update
Rules and Open Government Committee work plan review
Council-sponsored events approval process

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — May 20, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met on May 20, 2026 to approve meeting minutes, hear public comments, and select members for the Youth Advisory Committee for the 2026-27 fiscal year. The council also reviewed upcoming agendas for various city boards and commissions.
keyTopics: Youth Advisory Committee applicant selection for 2026-27
Public comment period
Meeting minutes approval
Upcoming board and commission meeting agendas

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — May 19, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held a regular meeting on May 19, 2026, to recognize Asian Pacific American Heritage Month and Affordable Housing Month. The council convened with a flag salute and reviewed minutes from the April meeting.
keyTopics: Asian Pacific American Heritage Month recognition
Affordable Housing Month observance
April meeting minutes review

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — May 19, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met to update the city's long-term health and safety plans through 2040, celebrated Public Works Week by recognizing the city's maintenance and infrastructure teams, and observed Asian American Pacific Islander Month.
keyTopics: Health and Safety Element update to the General Plan (2015-2040)
Recognition of Public Works Department for streets, sidewalks, trees, facilities, and environmental programs
Celebration of Asian American Pacific Islander (AAPI) Month
Public Works Week (May 17-23, 2026)

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — May 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: Santa Clara held a special meeting of the Station Area Task Force on May 21, 2026, at City Hall to discuss planning and development issues related to transit station areas. The meeting followed California's open meeting requirements and was available both in person and online.
keyTopics: Station Area Task Force special meeting convened
Meeting held at City Hall East Wing, 1500 Warburton Avenue
Hybrid format: in-person and Zoom attendance available

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — May 19, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026 where they passed several land development approvals, adopted new city regulations, and appointed a permanent City Manager. The council conducted public hearings on zoning and assessment matters that affect how the city grows and operates.
keyTopics: New city regulations (urgency ordinance and standard ordinance) added to city code
Site development permit and map approval for a development project
Property assessment confirmation and ordering
Appointment of permanent City Manager

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 15, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The city council discussed plans to help Palo Alto residents switch from gas to electric heating and appliances to meet new air quality standards. The council reviewed proposed principles for how the city should run these electrification assistance programs.
keyTopics: Residential electrification programs to help residents convert from gas to electric systems
New principles being proposed to guide how the city will implement these programs
Compliance with Air District regulations requiring reduced gas usage
